simple_extraction.description: Read and return a value from a known LocalScript data path.

filtering.description: Filter arrays or tables while preserving LocalScript array semantics.

transformation.description: Compute or mutate a value locally without rewriting unrelated payload fields.

normalization.description: Normalize input structures into the expected LocalScript shape.

datetime_conversion.description: Convert date and time fields with format guards and LocalScript-safe Lua logic.
